note: SP-04 / R1: float-only oblivious CatBoostRegressor. staged_predict(X, prediction_type='RawFormulaVal', eval_period=k) frozen as [n_stages, n_objects]. stage_tree_counts[k] are the EMPIRICALLY confirmed tree counts each stage corresponds to (matched against predict(ntree_end=c)).

start2_period3.note: Generated from the FROZEN model.cbm (loaded, not retrained). staged_predict(ntree_start=2,eval_period=3) sums trees [2,count) with NO bias.
